fullText:
Gold Rush is a steel dark ride roller coaster located at Rainbow's End in Manukau City, Auckland, New Zealand.

The ride features an enclosed section and is intertwined with Log Flume.

Rust track and supports.

The trains are modeled around mine-carts.
